title: Sony Confirms End of Disc Production for PlayStation Starting in 2028, Sparking Industry Crisis
summary: Sony's decision draws criticism from companies, digital preservation advocates, and analysts, while Nintendo positions itself as the last stronghold of physical media.

title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation to Have a Story Expansion Pass According to Store Leaks
summary: Store listings suggest that the end of the remake trilogy will not conclude Cloud's story and that more narrative content will come via DLC.

title: Frictional Games Delays Its Ambitious Space Horror Ontos Until 2027
summary: The studio behind Amnesia and Soma postpones the release of Ontos to fulfill its ambitious vision for the sci-fi game.

title: Relic Entertainment Announces a New Company of Heroes, a Roguelite Tactical Wave Defense Game
summary: Company of Heroes 3: Final Stand will arrive on July 29 as a direct action spin-off for players with limited time.

title: Suicide Squad Developers Confess Emotional Toll Caused by the Project, Nearly Leaving the Industry
summary: Executives from the failed Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League reveal how the spreadsheet-driven development pushed them to their professional and emotional limits.

title: The First Steam Machines Hit the Market with Mixed Reviews and Technical Issues Dubbed 'Red Line of Death'
summary: The launch of Valve's platform faces stability issues and criticism from figures like former PlayStation head Shuhei Yoshida.

title: Amazon Prime Gaming Gives Away a Dozen Games for Subscribers in July
summary: Amazon Prime members can now claim the 12 free titles of the month, expanding their digital collection at no extra cost.

title: Obsidian Entertainment Negotiating with Xbox to Avoid Possible Closure, According to Conflicting Reports
summary: Despite denials, the studio behind The Outer Worlds reportedly negotiated its future with Microsoft amid closure rumors.

title: Star Fox Debuts Strongly in Japan and Leads Sales Charts with 41,680 Units
summary: Nintendo's new title has had an excellent launch in the Japanese market, exceeding first-week sales expectations.

title: Dune: Awakening Announces Physical Edition for Consoles and Releases New Gameplay Trailer
summary: The Arrakis desert survival MMO will debut a physical format on PS5 while releasing a new gameplay trailer.

title: Captain America's Scandalous Summer Outfit in Marvel Rivals Causes Sensation on Social Media
summary: The animation of the American superhero's costume in the shooter game sparks a wave of memes and comments due to its detailed physique.

title: Rust's Common Ground Update Introduces Apartment Rentals and Stores
summary: Rust players will have to face greedy landlords to pay daily ransom, adding a layer of realistic capitalism to the game.

title: OtherSide Entertainment Suffers New Mass Layoffs, Reduces Team to Less Than 10 Employees
summary: The studio behind Thick as Thieves continues stealth development with a drastically reduced workforce after multiple staff cuts.

title: The Ninth Jedi, a New Japanese Vision for Star Wars That Expands the Saga's Future
summary: The short film from the Star Wars: Visions anthology presents an original story away from the Skywalker family, inspired by samurai cinema.

title: Orbitals, the Exclusive Cooperative Game for Switch 2, Confirms Full Physical Release
summary: Players who prefer to buy games in tangible form can now pre-order the Switch 2 cooperative shooter on cartridge.

title: Call of Duty Veteran Robert Bowling Founds Studio 18.bravo with a Game Preservation Policy
summary: The new studio promises to release its games as open source if they fail commercially, ensuring their preservation for the gaming community.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Reveals Release Times and Preload Requirements
summary: The remake of Ubisoft's classic pirate game confirms compatibility with Steam Deck and Steam Machine in its upcoming release.

title: MMO Cinder City Drastically Reduces RAM Requirements from 64 GB to 32 GB After Complaints
summary: The developers of Cinder City have modified the game's specifications in response to player criticism over the demanding memory requirements.

title: The Material Cost of the Future PlayStation 6 Is Estimated at Over $900, Doubling the Price of the PS5
summary: A cost analysis suggests that the launch price of the PS6 could far exceed $900, highlighting the rising cost of next-generation hardware.

title: Report Warns that the Next GTA 6 Could Be Unaffordable for Most Players
summary: Economic analyses indicate that the price of GTA 6 could break the traditional affordability barrier due to the current video game economy.
